name: linGetFallingEdgesOfDisturbedByte
title: linGetFallingEdgesOfDisturbedByte
description: With this function it is possible to retrieve time stamps of all falling edges in the disturbed byte or in the pseudo-byte caused by the last bit inversion.
Note, that prior to calling this function the measurement of the falling edges has to be activated and the bit inversion has to be executed (see linInvertRespBit, linInvertHeaderBit)

parameters.name: fallingEdges
parameters.description: An array which will receive the measured time stamps [in nanoseconds]. The array size is 6. Unused time stamps will be set to 0 (i.e. in case of less than 6 falling edges).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
